health_conditions: multiple partial elbow ligament tears (confirmed by MRI)

benefits.description: Visible gains in range of motion (ROM) after TB-500 injections
BPC-157 and TB-500 combination helpful for ligament injuries; synergy between the two compounds

protocol_notes: User has confirmed MRI diagnosis of 3 partial tears in elbow region. Used both BPC-157 (daily) and TB-500 (2x weekly at higher doses). Experienced significant loss of ROM from injury. Recommends combination of BPC-157 and TB-500 for ligament injuries due to synergistic effect. Notes extensive hematoma and bruising covering 1/2 of upper arm at triceps side post-injury.
